name: lean-ctx — SLO violation active
message:
lean-ctx reports {{value}} active SLO violation(s) on {{host.name}}.

Triage:
1. `lean-ctx slo` on the affected host shows which objective fired (availability / p95 / index lag)
2. Hosted team servers: follow docs/runbooks/hosted-index-slo.md (incident 1-3)
3. Local installs: check `lean-ctx doctor` and the dashboard Guards view

@ops-team
